steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: taught goldfish to drive a vehicle—a motorized fish tank with wheels shows fish can navigate on land with mechanical help.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D captures this idea: fish can navigate on land with a little mechanical help. The other three either claim fish only work in water, tie skill to environment, or mention treats, none of which match the clue.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
